i will be making another anniversary scenario with a dif character..😭 I love this oc of mine and actually use him quite a bit with any jing yuan bots i find because it just feels wrong to use anyone else for them.. he is so pookie

also 400 followers... i feel like I've been getting more followers pretty quickly and it makes me happy that people are enjoying the stuff i post on here since i started out posting the zhongli bot just for funsies😭
